add-sweet-pretzel.description: Add a sweet pretzel from Jamba Juice to the cart
add-sweet-pretzel.verifier: try { const cart = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.items; return cart.length === 1 && cart[0].itemName === 'sweet pretzel' && cart[0].storeName === 'Jamba Juice'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

filter-grocery-add-item.description: Filter by Grocery Category and Add an Item
filter-grocery-add-item.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return cart.length === 1 && cart[0].category === 'Fruit' && state.currentCategory === 'grocery'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

search-target.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; return state.currentStore.name === 'Target'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-kiwi-strawberries.description: Add kiwi and strawberries from DoorDash Market store and verify subtotal
add-kiwi-strawberries.verifier: try { const calculateCartTotal = (items) => { return items.reduce((total, item) => { const price = parseFloat(item.price.replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')); return total + price * item.quantity; }, 0); }; const cart = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.items; return cart.length === 2 && cart.some(i => i.itemName === 'Bananas') && cart.some(i => i.itemName === 'Milk') && calculateCartTotal(cart) === 4.98; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

remove-item-from-cart.verifier: try { const cart = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.items; return cart.length === 1 && cart[0].itemName === 'Burger'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

pick-meal-under-10.description: Pick a Meal Under $10 That Looks Tasty
pick-meal-under-10.verifier: try { const cart = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.items; return cart.length === 1 && cart[0].price < 10; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

clear-cart.description: Add 3 Items and Clear the Cart
clear-cart.verifier: try { const cart = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.items; return cart.length === 0; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

search-starbucks.description: Search for Starbucks and navigate to it
search-starbucks.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Starbucks'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-chocolate-cake.description: Find a restaurant that offers Chocolate Cake
find-chocolate-cake.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Mellis Cafe'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-new-restaurant.description: Find a new restaurant on DoorDash
find-new-restaurant.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Big Save Market'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-pizza-restaurants.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; return state.searchResults.every(resto => resto.categories.includes('pizza')); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-fast-delivery.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; return !state.searchResults.some(resto => parseInt(resto.time, 10) > 30); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-promotions.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; return !state.searchResults.some(resto => resto.discount === null || resto.discount === ''); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-cooler-bag.description: Find a cooler bag on Boichick Bagels and add to the cart
add-cooler-bag.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name === 'Boichik Bagels' && cart.length === 1 && cart[0].itemName === 'Blue Cooler Bag'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-cheap-coffee.description: Add a coffee from a cheap coffee restaurant
add-cheap-coffee.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const doesAllHasCoffeeCategory = !state.searchResults.some(resto => !resto.categories.includes('coffee')); const doesAllHas$PriceRange = !state.searchResults.some(rest => rest.priceRange !== '$'); const cart = state.items; const doesCartHasSomeItems = cart.length > 0; const isSelectedRestaurantPhilz = state.currentStore.name === 'Philz Coffee'; return doesAllHasCoffeeCategory && doesAllHas$PriceRange && doesCartHasSomeItems && isSelectedRestaurantPhilz; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-dessert-restaurants.description: Find dessert restaurants with average price
find-dessert-restaurants.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const doesAllHasDessertCategory = !state.searchResults.some(resto => !resto.categories.includes('dessert')); const doesAllHasAveragePriceRange = state.searchResults.filter(resto => resto.priceRange === '$' || resto.priceRange === '$$').length === searchResults.length; return doesAllHasDessertCategory && doesAllHasAveragePriceRange; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-expensive-breakfast.description: What are the most expensive breakfast restaurants?
find-expensive-breakfast.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const doesAllHasHighPriceRange = state.searchResults.filter(resto => resto.priceRange === '$$$$').length === state.searchResults.length; return doesAllHasHighPriceRange; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

reset-rating-filter.description: Find fast delivery over 4.6 rating restaurants and reset rating filter
reset-rating-filter.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const doesAllRestoHasDeliveryLessThanThrity = !state.searchResults.some(resto => parseInt(resto.time, 10) > 30); return doesAllRestoHasDeliveryLessThanThrity; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

reset-price-filter.description: Find the cheapest restaurants that offers pizza and reset price filter
reset-price-filter.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; return state.searchResults.every(resto => resto.categories.includes('pizza')); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-cheap-fast-delivery.verifier: try { const searchResults = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.searchResults; return searchResults.every(resto => parseInt(resto.time, 10) <= 30 && resto.priceRange === '$'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-fast-food-fast-delivery.description: Find Fast Food restaurants that delivers fast
find-fast-food-fast-delivery.verifier: try { const searchResults = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.searchResults; return searchResults.every(resto => parseInt(resto.time, 10) <= 30 && resto.categories.includes('fast-food')); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-breakfast-promotions.description: Find restaurants offering breakfast with promotions
find-breakfast-promotions.verifier: try { const searchResults = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.searchResults; return searchResults.every(resto => resto.categories.includes('breakfast') && resto.discount); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-top-rated-coffee.verifier: try { const searchResults = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.searchResults; return searchResults.every(resto => resto.categories.includes('coffee') && resto.rating >= 4.9); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-cheap-burger.description: Find cheap restaurants that offers burger
find-cheap-burger.verifier: try { const searchResults = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.searchResults; return searchResults.every(resto => resto.categories.includes('burger') && resto.priceRange === '$'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-cheap-comfort-food.description: Find cheap Comfort Food restaurants that delivers fast
find-cheap-comfort-food.verifier: try { const searchResults = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.searchResults; return searchResults.every(resto => resto.categories.includes('comfort-food') && parseInt(resto.time, 10) <= 30 && resto.priceRange === '$'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-high-rated-desserts.description: Find over 4.6 rating desserts restaurants with DashPass
find-high-rated-desserts.verifier: try { const searchResults = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.searchResults; return searchResults.every(resto => resto.categories.includes('desserts') && resto.dashPass && resto.rating >= 4.6); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

reset-search-result.description: Find Bakery fast delivery restaurants and reset the search result
reset-search-result.verifier: try { const searchResults = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state.searchResults; return searchResults.length === 0; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-most-ordered.description: Add item from 'Most Ordered' section of Philz Coffee
add-most-ordered.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name === 'Philz Coffee' && cart.length === 1 && cart[0].itemName === 'Mint Mojito Iced Coffee'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-cinnamon-roll-combo.description: Add a Cinnamon Roll with Soda combo from Gateway Croissant to the cart
add-cinnamon-roll-combo.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; const customizations = cart[0].customizations; const isAllCustomizationsPresent = customizations.includes('#2 · Value Combo') && customizations.includes('Soda'); return state.currentStore.name === 'Gateway Croissant' && cart.length === 1 && cart[0].itemName === 'Cinnamon Roll' && isAllCustomizationsPresent; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-immunity-shot.description: Add a default sized Immunity Shot to the cart
add-immunity-shot.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; const isCustomizationsEmpty = Array.isArray(cart[0].customizations) ? cart[0].length === 0 : !cart[0].customizations; return state.currentStore.name === 'Pressed Acai Bowls' && cart.length === 1 && cart[0].itemName === 'Immunity Shot' && isCustomizationsEmpty; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-customized-croissant.description: Add a large Ham and Cheese croissant with customizations to the cart
add-customized-croissant.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; const customizations = cart[0].customizations; const isAllCustomizationsPresent = customizations.includes('Large') && customizations.includes('Light Salad') && customizations.includes('Fruit Portion') && customizations.includes('Juice') && customizations.includes('Low Sugar'); return state.currentStore.name === 'Gateway Croissant' && cart.length === 1 && cart[0].itemName === 'Ham, Egg and Cheese Croissant' && isAllCustomizationsPresent; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-two-custom-lattes.description: Add 2 Caffè Latte from Starbucks: one vegan medium size and one low sugar small size
add-two-custom-lattes.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; const firstCartItemIsCorrect = cart[0].itemName === 'Caffè Latte' && cart[0].customizations.includes('Medium') && cart[0].customizations.includes('Vegan Option'); const secondCartItemIsCorrect = cart[1].itemName === 'Caffè Latte' && cart[1].customizations.includes('Small') && cart[1].customizations.includes('Low Sugar'); return state.currentStore.name.includes('Starbucks') && cart.length === 2 && firstCartItemIsCorrect && secondCartItemIsCorrect; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-croissant-high-rated.description: Add a croissant from a over 4.6 rating Bakery to the cart
add-croissant-high-rated.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; const allBakeryRatingOver4point6 = state.searchResults.every(resto => resto.categories.includes('bakery') && resto.rating >= 4.6); return allBakeryRatingOver4point6 && cart.length === 1 && cart[0].itemName.toLowerCase().includes('bagel'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

increase-bagel-quantity.description: Add a Classic bagel and a YooHoo beverage to Boichik Bagels cart and then increase the quantity of bagels to 4
increase-bagel-quantity.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Boichik Bagels') && cart.length === 2 && cart[0].itemName === 'Classic' && cart[0].quantity === 4 && cart[1].itemName === 'YooHoo' && cart[1].quantity === 1; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

remove-coffee-from-cart.description: Add a Turkey Sausage Sandwich and a Philtered Soul coffee from Philz Coffee then remove the coffee from the cart
remove-coffee-from-cart.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Philz Coffee') && cart.length === 1 && cart[0].itemName === 'Turkey Sausage Sandwich'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-recommended-item.description: Add a medium Bacon Burrito with snack from Philz Coffee and then complement the cart with a recommended item
add-recommended-item.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Philz Coffee') && cart.length === 2 && cart[0].itemName === 'Bacon Burrito' && cart[0].customizations.includes('Medium') && cart[0].customizations.includes('Snack Item'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

clear-all-items.description: Add a juice pack, a shot pack and a smoothie from Pressed Acai Bowls and then clear all items from the cart
clear-all-items.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Pressed Acai Bowls') && cart.length === 0; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

start-new-order.description: Start new order from Gateway Croissant
start-new-order.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; const allItemsFromGatewayCroissant = cart.every(item => item.storeName === 'Gateway Croissant'); return state.currentStore.name.includes('Gateway Croissant') && cart.length > 0 && allItemsFromGatewayCroissant; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

adjust-cart-quantities.description: Add one more Latte and remove one Apple Juice from the cart
adjust-cart-quantities.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name.includes('IL Canto Cafe') && cart.length === 2 && cart[0].itemName === 'Latte' && cart[0].quantity === 2 && cart[1].itemName === 'Apple Juice' && cart[1].quantity === 2; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-fast-grocery-item.description: Add an item from the grocery store that delivers in less than 30 minutes
add-fast-grocery-item.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const doesAllGroceryHasDeliveryLessThanThrity = !state.searchResults.some(store => parseInt(store.time, 10) > 30); return doesAllGroceryHasDeliveryLessThanThrity; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-organic-eggs.description: Add 2 cartons of organic eggs from Sprouts Farmers Market
add-organic-eggs.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name === 'Sprouts Farmers Market' && cart.length === 2 && cart[0].itemName === 'Vital Farms Organic Pasture Raised Eggs '; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-vegetables.description: Shop for vegetables (cucumber, broccoli and carrot) on Target
add-vegetables.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cartItems = state.items; const itemList = cartItems.map(item=>item.itemName); return state.currentStore.name === 'Target' && JSON.stringify(itemList.sort()) === JSON.stringify(['Baby Carrots', 'Broccoli Crown', 'Cucumber']); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-fruits.description: Go to Gus's Community Market and shop for fruits: 3 kiwis, 1 avocado, 1 bunch of strawberries
add-fruits.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cartItems = state.items; const avocado = cartItems[0]; const kiwi = cartItems[1]; const strawberries = cartItems[2]; return state.currentStore.name === 'Gus\'s Community Market' && avocado.itemName == 'Avocado' && avocado.quantity == 1 && kiwi.itemName == 'Kiwi' && kiwi.quantity == 3 && strawberries.itemName == 'Strawberries' && strawberries.quantity == 1; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

remove-cheese.description: Remove Sargento String Cheese Mozzarella from the cart
remove-cheese.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cartItems = state.items; const hasCheese = cartItems.some(function(el) { return el.itemName === 'Sargento String Cheese Mozzarella'; }); return !hasCheese; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

change-apple-quantity.description: Change quantity of apples to 6 in the cart
change-apple-quantity.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cartItems = state.items; const hasSixApples = cartItems.some(function(el) { return el.quantity == 6 && el.itemName == 'Apple'; }); return hasSixApples; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

start-new-grocery-order.description: Start a new grocery order from Target
start-new-grocery-order.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cartItems = state.items; return state.currentStore.name === 'Target' && cartItems.length > 0; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-gift-from-michaels.description: Add a $3 gift from Michaels to the cart
add-gift-from-michaels.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cartItems = state.items; return state.currentStore.name === 'Michaels' && cartItems.length == 1 && cartItems[0].price == '$2.99'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-headphones.description: Add 2 headphones from Best Buy to the cart
add-headphones.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cartItems = state.items; return state.currentStore.name === 'Bestbuy' && cartItems.length == 1 && cartItems[0].quantity == 2 && cartItems[0].itemName == 'JBL - TUNE520BT wireless on-ear headphones - Black'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-pet-items.description: Search for a dog poop bag and a cat shampoo on PetSmart and add it to the cart
add-pet-items.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cartItems = state.items; const poopBags = cartItems[0]; const catShampoo = cartItems[1]; return state.currentStore.name === 'PetSmart' && cartItems.length == 2 && poopBags.quantity == 1 && poopBags.itemName == 'Earth Rated Dog Poop Bags Refill Roll Unscented (120 ct)' && catShampoo.quantity == 1 && catShampoo.itemName == 'Advantage Treatment Shampoo for Cats & Kittens (8 oz)'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-milk-from-safeway.description: Search for Safeway in the Grocery section and add a gallon of milk to the cart
add-milk-from-safeway.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const searchResults = state.searchResults; if (searchResults[0].name !== 'Safeway') return false; const cartItems = state.items; return state.currentStore.name === 'Safeway' && cartItems.length == 1 && cartItems[0].name === 'Lucerne Vitamin D Whole Milk Carton' && cartItems[0].quantity == 1; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-airpods.description: Search for Best Buy in the Retail section and add a pair of AirPods Pro 2 to the cart
add-airpods.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')).state; const cart = state.items; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Best Buy') && cart.length === 1 && cart[0].itemName.includes('Apple - AirPods Pro 2'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }
